tools.name: overleaf_list_projects
tools.description: List Overleaf projects visible to the authenticated user.

tools.name: overleaf_create_project
tools.description: Create an Overleaf project, optionally from a template, and optionally attach tags.

tools.name: overleaf_create_file
tools.description: Create a file in an Overleaf project using the Git-backed workflow.

tools.name: overleaf_update_file
tools.description: Update a file in an Overleaf project using the Git-backed workflow.

tools.name: overleaf_delete_file
tools.description: Delete a file from an Overleaf project using the Git-backed workflow.

tools.name: overleaf_upload_files
tools.description: Upload one or more files into an existing Overleaf project.

tools.name: overleaf_upload_project_archive
tools.description: Create a new Overleaf project by uploading an archive such as a zip file.

tools.name: overleaf_download_pdf
tools.description: Download a compiled PDF for a project.

tools.name: overleaf_sync_pull
tools.description: Pull project changes from Overleaf into a local workspace.

tools.name: overleaf_sync_push
tools.description: Push local workspace changes to Overleaf.
